name: Duolingo DuoHacker v2
description:
Duolingo DuoHacker — Browser Extension

Adds the DuoHacker panel to Duolingo web with quick access to XP tools, streak helpers, quests, lesson tools, and more.

FEATURES

• Floating DuoHacker panel directly on Duolingo
• XP, streak, quest, and lesson helper tools
• Works on both duolingo.com and duolingo.cn
• Lightweight userscript-based loader

HOW TO USE
Install the extension
Open https://www.duolingo.com/ and sign in
Wait for the page to finish loading
The DuoHacker panel should appear automatically
PERMISSIONS

The extension only runs on official Duolingo pages and connects to the sites needed to load DuoHacker resources and assets.
